focus: Extended TC4 Infusion Matrix failure/craftCycle/FX/matching parity
ported_changes: Infusion instability is gated by the craft cycle delay instead of firing every progress tick.
Triggered instability events now consume the current craft cycle before normal essentia/component drain.
Invalid catalyst/structure paths roll a TC4-style instability event before failing.
Failure events now place FLUX_GOO and FLUX_GAS for TC4 eject-item type 1/3 and 2/4 outcomes.
Added PacketFXInfusionSource and PacketFXBlockZap 1.19.2 network adapters and client FX bridge.
XP drain now emits the entity-source infusion FX packet path.
Added TC4InfusionItemMatcher with item id, NBT, damage, and wildcard damage matching semantics.
Infusion JSON parser now supports catalyst/component object metadata: damage, meta, damage_wildcard, nbt.
Flux goo/gas behavior was narrowed toward finite TC4 spill behavior.
deferred_to_stage210: InfusionRunicAugmentRecipe / RS.HARDEN exact runic augment behavior.
Recipe materialization pass to annotate damage/NBT-sensitive original components.
Closer client-side sourceFX TTL particle rendering.

gradle_build.status: not run to completion in sandbox
gradle_build.reason: offline sandbox cannot download Gradle/Forge dependencies
